inputs.description: Select CMake build type for build tasks

tasks.label: SageStore: Clean Rebuild (all targets + docs)
tasks.detail: Clean build directory, rebuild all targets, then rebuild documentation.

tasks.label: SageStore: Build (with cache, all targets)
tasks.detail: Incremental build using Conan/CMake cache (configure + build).

tasks.label: SageStore: Build Documentation
tasks.detail: Validate docs links, render PlantUML, and generate Doxygen docs.

tasks.label: SageStore: Run Tests
tasks.detail: Run all CTest suites from current build directory.

tasks.label: SageStore: Run Server (only)
tasks.detail: Run server binary from build output.

tasks.label: SageStore: Run Client (only)
tasks.detail: Run client binary with WSLg/X display auto-detection.

tasks.label: SageStore: Run Client + Server
tasks.detail: Run server and launch client immediately.

tasks.label: SageStore: Build Windows Client
tasks.detail: Sync repo to a Windows mirror and build the native Windows client.

tasks.label: SageStore: Build Windows Server
tasks.detail: Sync repo to a Windows mirror and build the native Windows server.

tasks.label: SageStore: Build Windows Client + Server
tasks.detail: Sync repo to a Windows mirror and build the native Windows client and server.

tasks.label: SageStore: Run Windows Client
tasks.detail: Build the native Windows client in a Windows mirror and launch it.

tasks.label: SageStore: Run Windows Server
tasks.detail: Build the native Windows server in a Windows mirror and launch it.

tasks.label: SageStore: Run Windows Client + Server
tasks.detail: Build the native Windows client and server in a Windows mirror and launch both.
